arts.ttl: Arsenal player wants €13m to leave Gunners – Arteta request could be key
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Brazilian media, Jorginho’s proposed transfer from Arsenal to Flamengo has stalled due to differences over the contract offered to the Italy international. In recent weeks the 33-year-old has been linked with a move to the Brazilian giants after reports his agent is working on a deal. Globo today report The post Arsenal player wants €13m to leave Gunners – Arteta request could be key appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.sum: Since Gabriel Jesus’ injury, Arsenal’s discourse on adding a new striker in January has seemingly changed quite dramatically. Now, Mikel Arteta is quite openly talking...

arts.sum: Heading into the final weeks of the January transfer window, Arsenal are seemingly no closer to adding firepower to Mikel Arteta’s squad, at least from...

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus breaks silence on Arsenal injury nightmare after Mikel Arteta blow
arts.sum: Just days later, Arsenal confirmed that Jesus, who had scored five goals in his last six appearances in all competitions, had sustained an anterior cruciate ligament injury to his left leg and would require surgery to correct the issue. After the severity of Jesus' injury was confirmed, Arteta revealed that Arsenal will explore the possibility of recruiting a striker this month.

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker and Alan Shearer agree on divisive rule with Arsenal and Liverpool affected
arts.sum: Fans of Premier League title contenders Arsenal and Liverpool won't be able to watch their respective teams play live on television in the UK this weekend due to the 3pm blackout

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news LIVE - Dusan Vlahovic stance, Hugo Larsson enquiry, Mateus Cunha latest - football.london
arts.sum: Former Manchester City striker Sergio Aguero has backed Arsenal to win the Premier League "sooner rather than later. Aguero backs Arteta to win Premier League title "sooner rather than later"

arts.ttl: Arsenal now in strong position to sign £55m striker who could make Nicolas Jover look even better - opinion
Mikel Arteta receives fresh Arsenal backing from Man City title hero as pressure claim dismissed
arts.sum: Former Manchester City striker Sergio Aguero believes Mikel Arteta should not be under pressure to win the Premier League with Arsenal - but has backed the Spaniard to do so "sooner rather than later". However, Aguero believes there should be no pressure on Arteta to deliver the first Premier League title to the Emirates Stadium since 2004, as he hailed the "consistency" the Gunners have shown in recent seasons.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta’s biggest concern has materialised with Arsenal boss' U-turn confirmed
arts.sum: Fresh off a season where the Gunners netted a club-record 91 Premier League goals, the Gunners boss had faith in his side’s ability to once again spread the goal burden this term despite a number of summer exits. Arsenal seem particularly light in attacking areas, with no players in double figures in terms of goals for the season.
